Title: Increases the tax exemption on real property owned by members of volunteer fire companies or voluntary ambulance services in certain counties
Summary: Increases the tax exemption to twenty percent on real property owned by members of volunteer fire companies or voluntary ambulance services in certain counties.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to increasing the tax exemption on real property owned by members of volunteer fire companies or voluntary ambulance services in certain counties
